title: Onboarding - Eula page - Privacy Policy link
scenario: Onboarding EULA page Privacy Policy link opens HP Privacy Policy page with close button instead of back button
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or after clearing app data).
2. Observe the End User License Agreement (EULA) page displayed during onboarding.
3. Tap the "Privacy Policy" link on the EULA page.
4. Observe the web page that opens.
expected: The user is directed to the HP Privacy Policy page (https://www.hp.com/us-en/privacy/privacy.html). The page displays a close button (X) in the upper right corner.
